periods.label: Q1 2026
periods.summary: Launch of key courses on OSS and PT products: NTA, SAST, SIEM, WAF, AM. Auto-deployment platform for trainers.

items.name: OSS tools in Network Attack Analysis using NTA
items.description: 8 new case studies on the open-source tools Arkime and Wireshark. In total, the course contains 40 practical cases.

items.name: Fixing Web Vulnerabilities using SAST
items.description: A new course on web application source code analysis and subsequent web vulnerability remediation. A practical guide featuring 14 case studies on PT AI.

items.name: EdTechLab Installer - Auto-Deployment Platform
items.description: A platform for automated deployment of software packages for any configuration in On-Premise delivery.

items.name: Asset Management using AM
items.description: New course on asset management. Theoretical module available in April 2026. Course includes 10 practical cases from the start.

items.name: Security Event Analysis using SIEM
items.description: New cases added, now totaling 25 cases.

items.name: Cyber Attack Analysis on Web Applications using WAF
items.description: New cases added, now totaling 30 cases.

periods.label: Q2 2026
periods.summary: Beta testers program launch, new complex incident investigation course, and metaplatform with SaaS support.

items.name: Launching the PT ETL Testers program
items.description: The PT EdTechLab simulator beta testing program gives users the opportunity to explore training materials by testing preliminary versions and sharing their impressions and suggestions.

items.name: Comprehensive investigation of cyberattacks
items.description: New course on investigating complex cyber attacks using multiple security tools. Less theory, more practice on real attack chains. Red to blue practice: users first act as hackers breaking infrastructure, then investigate sophisticated attack chains.

items.name: ATT&CK Playbook: TTP in Practice
items.description: A new course on infrastructure security analysis. 100+ practical cases for practicing TTP in Red Team projects.

items.name: Metaplatform Beta Version
items.description: Major update of EdTechLab Academy learning platform. UX/UI refresh, new features. SaaS format support.

items.name: Threat Detection with EDR
items.description: New course on endpoint threat detection and analysis using EDR.

periods.label: Q3 2026
periods.summary: Introduction to Cybersecurity, first release of autonomous learning metaplatform, and VM course update.

items.name: Introduction to Cybersecurity
items.description: New IT fundamentals course with cybersecurity focus. 4 modules covering OS administration, computer networking, and web application deployment.

items.name: First Release of Autonomous Learning Metaplatform
items.description: Designed for use in On-Premise installations.

items.name: Vulnerability Remediation using VM
items.description: New cases added, now totaling 25 cases.

periods.label: Q4 2026
periods.summary: ICS attack analysis course, new OSS cases for WAF and SIEM, asset management course expansion.

items.name: ICS Cyber Attack Analysis using PT ISIM
items.description: New course on investigating cyber attacks on technological infrastructure.

items.name: OSS tools in Web Application Attack Analysis using WAF
items.description: New cases on SafeLine. Total of 35 practical cases ready.

items.name: OSS tools in Security Event Analysis using SIEM
items.description: New cases on Wazuh. Course will have 35 practical cases in total.

items.name: Asset Management using AM
items.description: New cases added, now totaling 20 cases.
